content: agent1: implementing batch_size param for multiple=True Click options. Will touch src/click/core.py (Option class, process_value/type_cast_value, info_dict) and src/click/types.py. Will ping before large structural changes.

agent1: done. My changes: Option.__init__ gains 'batch_size' kwarg + validation (only valid with multiple=True, ValueError if negative), self.batch_size stored, Option.to_info_dict() adds 'batch_size' key (always, even None), new Option.type_cast_value() override chunks the flat tuple into batches via types._batched(). Added helper fn types._batched() in types.py near convert_type(). No changes to Parameter base class or Argument. Should not conflict with Dynamic Default Resolution unless you also override Option.type_cast_value or edit the same docstring block around 'multiple' param.
